name: pheno-runtime-config
absorbed_into: KooshaPari/phenotype-infra (federation-service per ADR-049) + pheno-* runtime context layer
evidence_summary: Hot-reloadable runtime configuration library for the pheno-* fleet. Active, under 10 KB. Small surface, tested, dependency-light. Federated into phenotype-infra per ADR-049. Stays a standalone crate for clean versioning.
